title: CSS Only Loader

statement.markdown:
markdown: ## CSS Only Loader
Create a loader animation using only CSS. No JavaScript code is allowed. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

### Requirements
1. The loader should be a circular animation with a color change effect.
2. The loader should be centered horizontally and vertically on the page.
3. The loader should have a size of 100px.
4. The loader should be responsive and work well on different screen sizes.

constraints: Only CSS and HTML code is allowed.
No JavaScript code can be used.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The loader should be centered horizontally and vertically on the page.
The loader should have a size of 100px.
The loader should be responsive and work well on different screen sizes.

starterCode.html: css

gradingCriteria.description: Loader is a circular animation with a color change effect.
Loader is centered horizontally and vertically on the page.
Loader is responsive and works well on different screen sizes.
